200.description: Voucher validation result with discount details and adjusted price

schema.description: Voucher validation result with discount details

valid.description: Whether the voucher code is valid and can be applied

voucher_code.description: The voucher code that was validated

discount_value.description: Discount value (percentage amount or fixed GBP amount depending on discount_type)

discounted_price.description: New total price after the voucher discount has been applied, in GBP

original_price.description: Original total price before the voucher was applied, in GBP

property_id.description: Property ID the voucher was validated against

schema.title: VoucherResult

schema.description: Standard error response returned by all endpoints when a request fails (4xx/5xx)

statusCode.description: HTTP status code indicating the type of error

message.description: Human-readable error message, or an array of validation error strings for 422 responses

error.description: Short error label matching the HTTP status text

schema.title: Error

403.description: Invalid API key, IP not whitelisted, or origin not allowed

422.description: Validation failed — check message array for details

429.description: Rate limit exceeded — check Retry-After header

schema.description: Error response returned when a client exceeds their configured rate limit

retryAfter.description: Number of seconds the client should wait before retrying

schema.title: RateLimitError
